scope: TileLang DSv4 sparse-MQA backward continuation gate after straight-reference atomic rejection.

baseline.read: The direct vendored reference still loses to the current Triton sparse-atomic dKV wall because it must split heads and still performs per-selected dKV atomics.

sweep_results.read: Smaller head tiles double launch/work count and are worse.
Lower block size compiles but is slightly slower than block_size=32.
Best straight-reference full-width point, but still much slower than the Triton dKV wall.
Full H64/D512 compiles once dKV contribution/writeback is removed.
Best no-dKV diagnostic point: full-shape QK, softmax backward, dQ, and dAttnSink are fast in TileLang.

compile_failures.failure: TileLang lowering/vectorization internal error before runtime.
compile_failures.read: Lowering threads does not rescue direct H64/D512 reference.

compile_failures.failure: Requested dynamic shared memory 204800 exceeds device limit 163840.
compile_failures.read: Larger selected block is blocked by shared memory.

compile_failures.failure: Requested dynamic shared memory 167936 exceeds device limit 163840.
compile_failures.read: Removing dKV writeback nearly fits direct H64/D512; block_size=16 fits.

why: The straight reference is still too slow at full H64/D512: best measured split point is 28.09 ms.
The local no-dKV direct diagnostic proves TileLang can run the full H64/D512 non-dKV backward body at 2.19 ms.
Therefore the next TileLang target should be a dKV-specific rewrite, not another full-kernel split sweep.
decision.next_kernel_contract: Start from the no_dkv_directdq direct H64/D512 schedule, then add a TileLang dKV producer/reducer that keeps BS=16 or another shared-memory-fitting tile, accumulates multiple selected rows by compressed group inside the tile, and emits reduced dKV writes instead of per-selected T.atomic_addx4.
decision.first_promotion_gate: At S4096/H64/D512/topk512, full TileLang backward with reduced dKV writeback must beat the 8.01 ms Triton sparse-atomic dKV wall plus preserve the 2.19 ms non-dKV TileLang floor as much as possible.
